title: The Unexpected Reunion
content: While attending a friend's wedding, Grace recognized someone across the garden. It was Lucas, her high school boyfriend, whom she had not seen in almost ten years. They laughed about old memories and quickly realized how easily their conversations returned. Throughout the evening, they danced, talked, and caught up on everything life had brought them since graduation. Before leaving, Lucas suggested meeting again for coffee instead of waiting another decade. Grace smiled, realizing that some connections quietly survive the passing of time, waiting for the right moment to begin again.
